message: Generate audit planning summary for this client.
documentText: Client: ABC Trading LLC. Year end: 31 Dec 2025. Revenue: AED 12,500,000. Profit before tax: AED 850,000. Total assets: AED 8,200,000. Inventory: AED 3,100,000. Receivables: AED 2,400,000. Key risks: inventory valuation, revenue cutoff, receivables recoverability, related party transactions.
